raw.title: Smart & Sexy Women's Perfect Light Lined Push-Up Bra, Style-SA1170A - Walmart.com
raw.description: A bra so soft, you’ll never want to take it off. Our new Everyday Soft & Sexy Push-Up Bra was designed with unbeatable comfort in mind. Plush push-up padding creates flawless cleavage and lacey detailing makes this your most beautiful basic yet. At Smart & Sexy we believe every woman should set out to look and feel her best every day. That isn’t always easy with jobs, obligations and crazy schedules- but thinking of yourself is important too! Lingerie shouldn’t be just for special occasions, and with the perfect style and fit, we make it easy for you to look and feel sexy at incredibly smart prices. Fabric Content: 90% Polyester, 10% Spandex; Exclusive of Decoration. Plush push-up padding. Underwire support. Plunge neckline. Soft, brushed fabric. Scalloped lace detailing. Center bow and jewel detail. Adjustable and convertible straps that snap into place for secure hold. Ballet style back. Fit tested, true to size. Care Instructions: Hand wash cold with like colors. Use only non-chlorine bleach when needed. Line dry. Do not iron. info: We aim to show you accurate product information. Manufacturers, suppliers and others provide what you see here, and we have not verified it. See our disclaimer

raw.title: Smart & Sexy Women's Signature Lace Thong, 2-Pack, Style-SA849 - Walmart.com
raw.description: The signature lace collection just added another classic. This Smart & Sexy Signature Lacey Thong 2 Pack features your favorite signature lace in a flirty style. The wide lace waistband kisses your curves and lays flat under your clothes. Pair it with a Smart & Sexy signature lace bra to complete your lacey look. At Smart & Sexy we believe every woman should set out to look and feel her best everyday. That isn't always easy with jobs, obligations and crazy schedules- but thinking of yourself is important too! Lingerie shouldn't be just for special occasions, and with the perfect style and fit, we make it easy for you to look and feel sexy at incredibly smart prices. 2 Pack includes two Smart&Sexy Women's Signature Lace Thong Panties. Designed with stretchy, all-over Signature Lace. These thong panties lay flat against your curves and are lightweight and comfortable for all day wear. The wide lace waistband glides over your curves, accentuating your waist. Lace thongs can be worn low on the hips for a hipster panty look, or higher on the hips to elongate the look of the legs. These thong panties offer no back coverage. Center jewel and bow add a feminine touch to these lace panties. Lace thongs have a cotton lined gusset for comfort. Extended sizes available, including plus size thongs up to 3XL. These are the best panties to wear with the Smart&Sexy bras. info: We aim to show you accurate product information. raw.title: Women's Sterling Silver 035 Singapore Necklace - Walmart.com
raw.description: This necklace is the result of the basic Singapore chain being twisted to ensure a more dynamic and younger effect to the final chain. Available in various lengths, this single strand can be combined with other chains of the same style or with different sterling silver necklaces, depending on one's personal look. Measures 3.30 grams in weight, clasp is a spring ring. In order to ensure the longest product durability, silver is treated with IT-Prolux, a revolutionary anti-tarnish formula researched and developed in Italy. One of the all-time favorites, Singapore chains are suitable for all types of events, whether formal or informal and the combination of multiple chains together adds a touch of bling without being too striking. raw.title: Smart & Sexy Women's Signature Lace Thong, 2-Pack, Style-SA849 - Walmart.com
raw.description: The signature lace collection just added another classic. This Smart & Sexy Signature Lacey Thong 2 Pack features your favorite signature lace in a flirty style. The wide lace waistband kisses your curves and lays flat under your clothes. Pair it with a Smart & Sexy signature lace bra to complete your lacey look. At Smart & Sexy we believe every woman should set out to look and feel her best everyday. That isn't always easy with jobs, obligations and crazy schedules- but thinking of yourself is important too! Lingerie shouldn't be just for special occasions, and with the perfect style and fit, we make it easy for you to look and feel sexy at incredibly smart prices. 2 Pack includes two Smart&Sexy Women's Signature Lace Thong Panties. Designed with stretchy, all-over Signature Lace. These thong panties lay flat against your curves and are lightweight and comfortable for all day wear. The wide lace waistband glides over your curves, accentuating your waist. Lace thongs can be worn low on the hips for a hipster panty look, or higher on the hips to elongate the look of the legs. These thong panties offer no back coverage. Center jewel and bow add a feminine touch to these lace panties. Lace thongs have a cotton lined gusset for comfort. Extended sizes available, including plus size thongs up to 3XL. These are the best panties to wear with the Smart&Sexy bras. info: We aim to show you accurate product information. Manufacturers, suppliers and others provide what you see here, and we have not verified it. See our disclaimer

At Smart & Sexy we believe every woman should set out to look and feel her best every day. That isn’t always easy with jobs, obligations and crazy schedules- but thinking of yourself is important too! Lingerie shouldn’t be just for special occasions, and with the perfect style and fit, we make it easy for you to look and feel sexy at incredibly smart prices. Joyspun’s 7/8 High-Waisted Tights slip on with ease in buttery-soft fabric with stretch for a comfortable fit and gentle support. The perfect women's pant for everyday wear, this opaque legging-like style is a great match to pair with your favorite athleisure or casual tops for running errands or even a light stretch or workout. Store your favorite small essentials into the side pocket. Now in rich, fall colors to elevate your wardrobe. raw.title: Joyspun Women's Footless Blackout Tights, 2-Pack, Sizes S-3XL
raw.description:
• Pack of 2 black footless tights for women, medium
  • Black footless tights for women with blackout opaque coverage
  • Control top for a smooth fit & footless design for versatility with any shoe
  • Smooth, invisible flat seams for superior comfort
  • Pull-on style closure for easy on/off
  • 93% Nylon/7% Spandex panty, 91% Nylon/9% Spandex leg for comfort and fit
  • Perfect for pairing with skirts, dresses, or casual outfits
  • Machine washable for easy care and maintenance

spec_table.Fabric care: Machine wash cold with like colors. Delicate Cycle. Only non-chlorine bleach when needed. Tumble dry low. Do not iron.

raw.title: Smart & Sexy Women's Signature Lace Push Up Bra, Single and 2-Pack
raw.description:
• All the right options in all the right places, the Smart&Sexy Signature Lace Push-Up Bra has molded cups to create an enhanced, yet natural looking cleavage thanks to the encased underwire that anchors the bra providing additional support and lift.
  • Guaranteed to the be the most effortlessly sexy bra in your rotation. This push-up bra is designed with all-over Signature Lace with scalloped lace edges outlining the cups and wings have a hint of sheer, stretch lace.
  • Adjustable straps vary in width depending on the bra size for support and comfort. Scalloped lace neckline and beautiful center gore bow and jewel detail make this bra perfect for everyday wear and special occasions.
  • Fabric content: 94% Nylon, 6% Spandex, exclusive of decoratio
  • Adjustable back hook and eye closure. Fit tested, true to size. Inclusive size range includes plus size bra sizes up to 42DD.

spec_table.Fabric care: Hand wash cold with like colors. Use only non-chlorine bleach when needed. Line dry. Do not iron.

From running errands to hanging around at home, these men's pull-on pants offer great comfort and have more storage than most basic sweatpants, with two cargo pockets and two side pockets with plenty of room for stashing your keys, phone and other essentials. Pair them with your favorite T-shirts, tanks and hoodies, and get down to the business of relaxing. raw.title: Joyspun Women's Seamless Hi Cut Panties, 6-Pack, Sizes XS to 3XL - Walmart.com
raw.description: Meet Joyspun. A joyful new spin on Secret Treasures. Exclusively at Walmart. Joyspun’s 6-Pack of Seamless High-Cut Panties is a great value pack. Crafted with smooth, seamless fabric, our seamless high-cut panty offers a comfortable and flexible fit. Also available in a range of colors and prints, this 6-pack offers style and function. The seamless high-cut panty offers full back coverage and sits above the waist and is designed through a tubular knitting technology process—meaning there are no side seams, offering a seam-free construction around the body. This kind of seamless design ensures the high-cut panty is knit with the right amount of stretch and durability while offering the all-day comfort you’ll love. Material: 96% Polyester/4% Spandex Care: Machine washable Country of Origin: Imported Set includes: 6 pairs of panties Closure: Pull-on; sits above the waist Waistband Type: Stretch knit waistband Features: Full back coverage; seamless design; super-soft stretch fabric offers a flexible fit designed for all-day comfort Women’s Seamless High-Cut Panties 6-Pack from Joyspun info: We aim to show you accurate product information. Manufacturers, suppliers and others provide what you see here, and we have not verified it. See our disclaimer

raw.title: Smart & Sexy Women's Signature Lace Thong, 2-Pack, Style-SA849
raw.description:
• 2 Pack includes two Smart&Sexy Women's Signature Lace Thong Panties.
  • Designed with stretchy, all-over Signature Lace. These thong panties lay flat against your curves and are lightweight and comfortable for all day wear.
  • The wide lace waistband glides over your curves, accentuating your waist.
  • Lace thongs can be worn low on the hips for a hipster panty look, or higher on the hips to elongate the look of the legs.
  • These thong panties offer no back coverage.
  • Center jewel and bow add a feminine touch to these lace panties.
  • Lace thongs have a cotton lined gusset for comfort.
  • Extended sizes available, including plus size thongs up to 3XL.
  • These are the best panties to wear with the Smart&Sexy bras.

spec_table.Fabric care: Hand Wash Cold With Like Colors. Use Only Non-Chlorine Bleach When Needed. Do Not Iron

This three-pack includes three semi-sheer shadow stripe panties in fun and unique colors for a great value! Only at Walmart. raw.title: Joyspun Women's Infinite Comfort Stretch Hipster Panties, 3-Pack, Sizes XS to 3XL
raw.description:
• Material: 80% Nylon/20% Spandex
  • Care: Machine washable
  • Country of Origin: Imported
  • Set includes: 3 hipster panties
  • Size: Model is wearing a size M
  • Coverage: Moderate
  • Closure: Pull-on style with a soft, elasticized waistband
  • Features: Buttery soft fabric; comfortably hugs the body; soft fabric waistband with a mid-rise; sits below the belly button; stretches without losing its shape; soft cotton gusset; tag-free for added comfort
  • Women’s Three-Pack of Hipster Panties from Joyspun

spec_table.Fabric care: Machine wash cold gentle cycle with like colors. Use non-chlorine bleach when needed. Tumble dry low. Remove promptly. Do not iron.
